definition:
ἀμύνω 
 [in LXX (mid.): Jos.10:13 (נָקַם), נָקַם), Psa.118:10-12 מוּל hi.), Isa.59:16 (יָשַׁע hi.), Wis.11:3, al. ;] 
to ward off, etc. Mid. 
   (a) to defend oneself against; 
   (b) to requite; 
   (with) = act., to defend, assist (Isa, l.with): with accusative of person(s), Act.7:24 (MM, VGT, see word).†
 (AS)
